title: Session 17 — Back to Koviz
bodyText:
**TL;DR: Split into team sneaky (find G) and team loud (find Filbert) back in a Koviz plastered with F & B posters — Cumb killed the captured goblin, G was briefed, and planning moved to Varen's apartment.**

# What happened
- Two teams: **team sneaky** (find [[giuseppe|G]]) and **team loud** (find [[filbert]]).
- En route, a goblin trap was spotted and dispatched — one escaped, one captured, and **[[cumb]] "spared her from torture" by killing her himself**.
- In [[koviz]]: the **F & B company's expansion** everywhere (posters of [[pc-brolin|Brolin]] and Filbert, "[[gond]]'s Gift to Koviz").
- Awkward Filbert conversations; G found and briefed.
- Planning at Gond's Craft ([[gabriel]] vetoed hideout status) moved to **[[pc-varen|Varen]]'s apartment** for the night.

# Fired / left smoking
- [x] G located and briefed.
- One goblin from the trap escaped.

# Threads
[[giuseppe]] · [[filbert]] · [[cumb]] · [[koviz]]
